data.title: Scalable Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: The site is built on a scalable cloud platform designed to handle high traffic volume efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes AWS and Kubernetes for auto-scaling and load balancing.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: A microservices framework allows independent services to streamline functionality and updates.
data.technical_spec: Docker containers facilitate service independence and microservice communication.

data.title: Responsive Frontend Design
data.description: The frontend architecture is created to be responsive across a wide range of devices and screen sizes.
data.technical_spec: Implemented using React.js and CSS3 media queries.

data.title: API-driven Backend
data.description: Backend processes are structured via RESTful API endpoints to provide data handling and business logic.
data.technical_spec: Node.js with Express framework for API implementation.

data.title: Database Normalization
data.description: Database designs follow a normalized structure for optimal performance and reduced redundancy.
data.technical_spec: Databases are managed using PostgreSQL with appropriate indexing.
